$comment: Adaptive-lab blueprint. Variation is AUTHORED and finite; every variant must pass the CI auto-solve harness before release. Solutions are CI-only secrets.

slug-collapse.description: slugify's character class lost its + quantifier behind a 'simplified' comment; runs of separators no longer collapse.
solution: const f=require('fs');const p='src/text.ts';f.writeFileSync(p,f.readFileSync(p,'utf8').replace('    // Simplified the character class while in here.\n    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, "-")','    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-")'))

excerpt-off-by-one.description: excerpt slices maxWords-1 behind a 'reserve room for the ellipsis' rationale; excerpts run one word short.
solution: const f=require('fs');const p='src/text.ts';f.writeFileSync(p,f.readFileSync(p,'utf8').replace('  // Reserve room for the ellipsis so the excerpt never overflows.\n  return words.slice(0, maxWords - 1).join(" ") + "…";','  return words.slice(0, maxWords).join(" ") + "…";'))
